overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt trail through tall grass at night in a video game environment. The player character holds a torch that periodically swings into the upper left of the frame, casting warm flickering light on the path and surrounding vegetation while distant trees are visible against the starry sky.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail cutting through dense tall grass at night. A large tree dominates the right side of the frame initially, gradually receding into the distance as the player advances. Around 3.5 seconds, the torch held by the player character swings into view from the upper left, casting warm flickering light that illuminates the path and surrounding vegetation against the dark starry sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark rural trail that transitions from a shadowed forest path into a torch-lit corridor of grass. It begins by advancing steadily along a narrow dirt track, with a large, imposing tree dominating the right side of the frame before gradually receding into the distance. As the camera pushes further into the night, a torch swings into view from the upper left, cutting through the darkness. This movement shifts the lighting from deep shadows to a warm, flickering glow that illuminates the surrounding dense tall grass and the path ahead against a backdrop of a starry sky.
